basic_details.job_title: NHM Chandigarh Recruitment 2026 - Walkin for Budget Finance Officer and Consultant IEC Posts
basic_details.post_name: Budget Finance Officer and Consultant IEC
basic_details.short_information: National Health Mission Chandigarh (NHM Chandigarh) Budget Finance Officer and Consultant IEC Notification 2026 has been released on 10 June 2026 on the official website of NHM Chandigarh. A total of 2 vacancies have been announced through the NHM Chandigarh Budget Finance Officer and Consultant IEC Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 60 years for all posts.

qualification.education_qualification: MBA in Finance or M.Com (full time course), MBA (full time course) with 1 year experience in IEC, Post Graduate Degree in Mass Communication (full time course)
qualification.details: Budget Finance Officer under NHM: Essential: MBA in Finance or M.Com (full time course) from a recognized university. 5 years experience after PG in Financial Management and Accounting procedures in Govt. Sectors, Boards or Private Sector. Preferably knowledge of Tally (Accounting Software) and Computers. Consultant IEC (NUHM) under NHM: Essential: MBA (full time course) with 1 year of Post qualification experience in IEC Or Post Graduate Degree in Mass Communication (full time course). Desirable: Knowledge of Web Designing/ Photo Shop/ Coral Draw. Experience of working in Health Department will be preferred.

salary_details.details: Budget Finance Officer under NHM: Rs. 45000 Per Month Consultant IEC (NUHM) under NHM: Rs. 40000 Per Month

all_official_links.label: Download NHM Chandigarh Job 2026 Notification PDF

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview for NHM Chandigarh Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for the NHM Chandigarh recruitment is scheduled for 17th June 2026. Candidates are advised to reach the venue on time with all necessary documents.

faq.question: Q2. What are the educational qualifications required for the Budget Finance Officer post?
faq.answer: For the Budget Finance Officer post, candidates must possess an MBA in Finance or M.Com (full time course) from a recognized university, along with 5 years of post-PG experience in financial management and accounting procedures.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the posts announced by NHM Chandigarh?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for all the posts announced by NHM Chandigarh is 60 years. There is no minimum age limit specified in the provided data.

faq.question: Q4. Is there any application fee for NHM Chandigarh Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee required for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive. Candidates can attend the walk-in interview without paying any fee.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Consultant IEC post?
faq.answer: The Consultant IEC post offers a monthly salary of Rs. 40,000. This is a contractual position under the National Health Mission Chandigarh.

faq.question: Q6. What documents should candidates carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates should carry all original documents, one set of self-attested photocopies (ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates, category certificate if applicable), and recent passport-size photographs.

faq.question: Q7. What is the total number of vacancies announced by NHM Chandigarh?
faq.answer: NHM Chandigarh has announced a total of 2 vacancies for the posts of Budget Finance Officer and Consultant IEC. Each post has one vacancy.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for these contractual posts?
faq.answer: The selection process for these contractual posts will involve a Walk-in Interview followed by Document Verification. Candidates need to perform well in both stages to be considered.

faq.question: Q9. Where will the walk-in interview be conducted?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be conducted in Chandigarh. The exact venue address is usually detailed in the official notification PDF, which can be accessed via the provided links.

faq.question: Q10. What is the job type for these positions?
faq.answer: The job type for both the Budget Finance Officer and Consultant IEC positions is contractual. This means the employment will be for a fixed period as per the terms of the contract.
